THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUNNINGHAM, ARCHIBALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARMER'S INSURANCE GROUP C/O MARY ANN SELTEZ SNIDER, WILMA $979.85 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,034.85, FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO WILMA SNIDER RETURNED--MOVED, NOT FORWARDABLE
